title: Chestnut (seed) from chestnut groves at mountain hillsides and surroundings
description: The MOVING reference member state of this VC (Value Chain) is PORTUGAL ESTRELA. The reference MOVING Card ID of this VC is VC 09 PT2. At Serra da Estrela hillsides and surroundings there are several hectares of chestnut groves. Chestnuts (seeds) are harvested and sold locally and nationally. Products made from Chestnuts (seeds) area also produced and sold loccally.

title: Mountain landscape and reference chains
description: The reference mountain chain of this VC is Cordilheira Central (RR08). The reference mountain landscape of this VC is Seia. Located on the western slope of Serra da Estrela, Seia is a municipality with 21 parishes, in the district of Guarda in the Centre region of Portugal. Seia shares with the municipalities of Covilhã and Manteigas, the highest point in mainland Portugal at 1993 meters of altitude. Seia has a strong industrial tradition, mainly related to textiles and the distribution of electricity. The production of sheep's cheese is also a tradition.

title: Interest on this VC
description: Product connected to territorial identity as chestnut (seed) production is a traditional activity in Serra da Estrela with several hectares of chestnut groves on the mountain hillsides and surroundings. Chestnut (seed) call visitors interested in gastronomic autumn tourism to local annual Chestnut (seed) festivals. Product characteristic of the MRL. Product highly connected to land use and landscape management.

title: Key local assets
description: Chestnut tree (Castanea sativa) is a deciduous plant that can reach 20 or 30 m in height and usually occupies mountainous or cool regions. It is monoecious and flowering occurs from May to June. Fruit maturation occurs in October.

title: Challenges
description: Will climate change affect chestnuts grooves distribution and chestnuts (seeds) quality?. Overall the type of challenge faced by this VC is Predicted. This VC is classified as Traditional.

title: Concluding remarks
description: Chestnuts (seeds) are produced in different municipalities intersecting or surrounding Serra da Estrela.
